zh.Withiel, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter De Trenoweth於大約1288年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Stephen Trenoweth20歲，母親Johanna Trenaco17歲。他於大約1315年與Margaret Boteler在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1359年7月27日在他的家鄉享年72歲。

zh-hans.Withiel, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter De Trenoweth于大约1288年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Stephen Trenoweth20岁，母亲Johanna Trenaco17岁。他于大约1315年与Margaret Boteler在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1359年7月27日在他的家乡享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trenoweth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from one or more of at least twenty places in Cornwall named with Cornish tre ‘house, settlement’ + nowyth ‘new’, with the spellings Trenewth, Trenouth, Trenowah, Trenower, Trenoweth, Trenowth, Trenute, or Trenuth.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter De Trenoweth was born about 1288, in Cornwall, England, his father, Stephen Trenoweth, was 20 and his mother, Johanna Trenaco, was 17. He married Margaret Boteler about 1315, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 27 July 1359, in his hometown, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter De Trenoweth est né environ 1288, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Stephen Trenoweth, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Johanna Trenaco, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Boteler environ 1315, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 27 juillet 1359, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter De Trenoweth um 1288 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen Trenoweth 20 und seine Mutter Johanna Trenaco 17. Er hat um 1315 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Margaret Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 27. Juli 1359 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter De Trenoweth è nato il circa 1288 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Stephen Trenoweth, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Trenaco, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Boteler circa 1315, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 27 luglio 1359, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter De Trenowethが約1288年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Stephen Trenowethは20歳，母Johanna Trenacoは17歳であった。約1315年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでMargaret Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1359年7月27日に故郷で72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter De Trenoweth(이)가 대략 1288년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Trenoweth(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Trenaco(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Margaret Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1359년 7월 27일 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Withiel, Cornwall, England: Egloswydhyel, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter De Trenoweth nasceu aproximadamente 1288, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen Trenoweth, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Trenaco, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Boteler aproximadamente 1315, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 27 de julho de 1359, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter De Trenoweth родился около 1288 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Stephen Trenoweth было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Trenaco, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Boteler около 1315 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 27 июля 1359 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter De Trenoweth nació aproximadamente 1288, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Stephen Trenoweth, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Johanna Trenaco, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Margaret Boteler aproximadamente 1315, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 27 de julio de 1359, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años.
